race.comment: CASH (14) went to a new level last start when finally putting it all together and destroying his rivals. Hickmott looks to have unlocked him now and he'll be hard to stop on the minimum. ARRAN BAY (1) was too tough in the CS Hayes Memorial two back then turned in another brave effort at Flemington. He's as honest as they come and will give another strong account. VERDAD (5) is back at headquarters after chasing gamely behind ARRAN BAY two back then beating him home last time. There's never much between them and both turn up every time. CHIEF LITTLE ROCK (7) is an Irish import on debut for the Freedmans. His figures are strong and he's had plenty of work put into him. One to monitor.
